one_time_description: Treaty Salaries settlement of $3,044,558 less legal expenses of $529,962 and Treaty Annuities settlement overpayment recovery of $172,834, net other items $2,317,639
economic_notes: Nation operates Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd., and Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings Limited Partnership as business entities under modified equity method. Nation impacted by COVID-19 office closures, travel restrictions, and increased costs.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Significant one-time items: Treaty Salaries settlement of $3,044,558 recognized as revenue, offset by $529,962 in legal expenses and $172,834 Treaty Annuities overpayment recovery. Accounts receivable includes $3,044,558 Treaty Salaries settlement proceeds receivable from Government of Canada. Nation has contingent asset from Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada (loan of $1,381,240 drawn to finance claim). Three entities consolidated (Poundmaker Cree Nation, CMHC Housing, Royalty Corp, Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, West Arrow Development Corp); three entities under modified equity method (Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings LP, Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd.). Poundmaker Legacy Trust not consolidated. RBC Treaty Salaries loan of $2,000,000 repaid April 2022 from settlement proceeds. Net debt position of $10,677,411. Capital segment expenses $158,988 and Other segment expenses $1,592,369 not mapped to standard categories.
